summary: Tested NEW feature: Rapports Stock filtrables avec export PDF et Excel. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - Reports section accessible via sidebar, all filters working (Type, Date, Search), statistics cards displayed, Top Produits section, movements table with all columns, PDF and Excel export buttons present and functional.

issues: Minor: React hydration warning about <span> inside <tbody> - cosmetic issue, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/stock/reports - Returns movements, total_movements, total_quantity, total_value, by_type, top_products
✅ Backend: GET /api/stock/reports?type=entree - Filters entries only (entree, retour_fournisseur)
✅ Backend: GET /api/stock/reports?type=sortie - Filters sorties only
✅ Backend: GET /api/stock/reports?search=Poulet - Filters by product name
✅ Backend: GET /api/stock/reports?date_from=2026-04-16 - Filters by date
✅ Backend: by_type aggregation correct (count, quantity, value per type)
✅ Backend: top_products sorted by value descending
✅ Backend: GET /api/stock/reports/export/pdf - Returns 200, content-type application/pdf, valid PDF header
✅ Backend: PDF export with type filter works
✅ Backend: PDF export with date filter works
✅ Backend: PDF export with search filter works
✅ Backend: GET /api/stock/reports/export/excel - Returns 200, content-type xlsx, valid zip header
✅ Backend: Excel export with type filter works
✅ Backend: Excel export with date filter works
✅ Backend: Excel export with search filter works
✅ Backend: POST /api/stock/auth/login - admin/Admin2026 works
✅ Frontend: 'Rapports' nav item visible in sidebar
✅ Frontend: Type filter dropdown present and functional
✅ Frontend: Date Du/Au filters present
✅ Frontend: Product search filter present
✅ Frontend: Filtrer button loads report
✅ Frontend: PDF export button present
✅ Frontend: Excel export button present
✅ Frontend: Statistics cards: Total Mouvements, Quantité Totale, Valeur Totale, Par Type badges
✅ Frontend: Top Produits (par valeur) grid displayed
✅ Frontend: Movements table with columns: Date, Produit, Type, Quantité, Avant, Après, Valeur, Motif
critical_code_review_comments: PDF export uses reportlab with proper table formatting and color-coded types
Excel export uses openpyxl with 2 sheets: Mouvements + Top Produits
Frontend StockPage.jsx has complete reports section with filters, stats, and table
Minor: React hydration warning in console about span inside tbody - cosmetic only
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing 47 movements (30 sorties, 14 entrees, 3 ajustements)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rapports Stock feature fully working. GET /api/stock/reports with filters (type, date_from, date_to, search). Exports at /api/stock/reports/export/pdf and /api/stock/reports/export/excel. Frontend has dedicated 'Rapports' section in Stock module sidebar. Statistics show total_movements, total_quantity, total_value, by_type badges. Top Produits grid shows top 10 products by value. Movements table shows all movement details.

reports_api.notes: GET /api/stock/reports returns movements with aggregated stats

reports_filters.notes: type, date_from, date_to, search filters all functional

reports_by_type.notes: Aggregation by movement type (count, quantity, value)

reports_top_products.notes: Top 20 products sorted by value descending

export_pdf.notes: Returns valid PDF with formatted table, color-coded types

export_excel.notes: Returns valid xlsx with 2 sheets: Mouvements + Top Produits

frontend_reports_section.notes: Sidebar nav, filters, stats cards, top products grid, movements table
